tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
We had a plan, move out of this town baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
West to the sand, it's all we talked about lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I'd pack the car, bring your guitar, and Jane for smoking[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
First thing at dawn, you'd queue the songs and we'd get going[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
But you weren't home, waited on the porch for ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Sat there alone, all throughout the morn' till I[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Got a hunch down in my gut and snuck around the back[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Empty cans and I'll be d*mned, your sh*t was never packed[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Did your boots stop working? Did your truck break down?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
Did you burn through money? Did your ex find out?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Where there's a will then there's a way[/tab]

And I'm d*mn sure you lost it
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Didn't even say goodbye, just wish I knew what caused it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Was the whiskey flowing? Were you in a fight?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
Did the nerves come get you? What's your alibi?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I made my way back to L.A. and that's where you'll be forgotten[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
In 40 years you'll still be here, drunk washed up in Austin[/tab]

[Break]
[ch]Am[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
H*ll of a bluff you had me believing[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
How many months did you plan on leaving?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
What happened? Bad habits? Did you go back? Go batsh*t[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I loved you, how tragic ohh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Did your boots stop working? Did your truck break down?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
Did you burn through money? Did your ex find out?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Where there's a will then there's a way[/tab]

And I'm d*mn sure you lost it
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Didn't even say goodbye, just wish I knew what caused it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Was the whiskey flowing? Were you in a fight?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
Did the nerves come get you? What's your alibi?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I made my way back to L.A. and that's where you'll be forgotten[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
In 40 years you'll still be here, drunk washed up in Austin[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch]
